callGraph.callee:
editor
						.chain()
						.focus()
						.deleteRange({ from: pos, to: pos + node.nodeSize })
						.run

functions.name: TiptapPromptEditor
params:
{
	cwd,
	searchFiles,
	previewSlashCommand,
	slashCommands,
	availableModels,
	placeholder = "Ask to make changes, @mention files, run /commands",
	className,
	focusShortcutText,
}

callGraph.callee:
ed.chain()
									.deleteRange(range)
									.insertContentAt(range.from, [
										{ type: "file-mention", attrs: { path: props.path } },
										{ type: "text", text: " " },
									])
									.run
